name: taw-mem
description: Local-first persistent memory for Codex and MCP-compatible coding agents.

interface.longDescription: Store, recall, audit, and compact project memory locally through a SQLite-backed MCP server. Designed for coding agents that move between repos, VM/server sessions, reviews, setup/debug work, and continuation tasks without sending memory storage to a hosted service.
defaultPrompt: Recall prior context for this repo before changing files
Save the root cause and verification after this fix
Audit and compact local memories for this project
